title: Update Redstone Torch
description: Update old redstone torch texture and model from version 1.21.2
body:
**Update Redstone Torch** - resource pack that changes the old model and texture of the redstone torch, making it more pleasant and beautiful. Now it's not just the texture of an ordinary torch with a red outline.

The model and texture of the redstone torch have been updated in snapshot 24w33a (1.21.2)

![torch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ace34132564acc25916cf5e044c3f5259f78b07.png)
